title: Pipeline Execution
description: pipeline() helper orchestrating sequential processing stages: middleware chain → gateway text generation → response construction
activity_steps: Generate UUID invocation ID via Str::uuid7()
[Decision] Is agent faked (Ai::hasFakeGatewayFor)? → YES: prepend fake-recording middleware (Ai::recordPrompt)
[Decision] Does agent use RemembersConversations trait AND hasConversationParticipant()? → YES: append RememberConversation middleware
[Decision] Does agent implement HasMiddleware? → YES: append agent's own middleware()
Each middleware receives AgentPrompt, can modify it, calls $next($prompt) to continue
RememberConversation::handle(): calls $next($prompt) first, then on response: create/store conversation + store user+assistant messages
[Decision] Agent implements Conversational? → YES: load agent->messages() as base; NO: use empty []
Append new UserMessage(prompt->prompt, prompt->attachments->all()) to messages array
Register tool listeners via listenForToolInvocations(invocationId, agent)
Tool invocation: dispatch InvokingTool event, assign currentToolInvocationId
Tool invoked: dispatch ToolInvoked event with result
[Decision] Agent implements HasStructuredOutput? → YES: $schema = agent->schema(JsonSchemaTypeFactory); NO: $schema = null
Call textGateway()->generateText(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, TextGenerationOptions::forAgent(agent), timeout)
Gateway executes LLM API call, handles tool-call loop internally, returns raw GatewayResponse
GatewayResponse contains: text, structured?, toolCalls[], toolResults[], steps[Step|StructuredStep], usage, meta, messages[]
YES → new StructuredAgentResponse(invocationId, structured, text, usage, meta).withToolCallsAndResults(...).withSteps(steps)
(generateTitle calls textGateway()->generateText with cheapestTextModel for 3-5 word title)
key_participants: pipeline() — factory: returns Illuminate\Pipeline\Pipeline with IoC container
GeneratesText (trait) — orchestrator: owns prompt() and gatherMiddlewareFor()
AiManager — resolves TextProvider instances; textProviderFor(agent) injects fake gateway if needed
TextProvider (interface) — prompt(), stream(), textGateway(), useTextGateway(), defaultTextModel()
AgentPrompt — pipeline payload: agent, prompt string, attachments, provider, model, timeout
Prompt (abstract) — base: prompt string, TextProvider, model
RememberConversation (middleware) — post-call: stores conversation + messages to ConversationStore
TextGateway (interface) — generateText(), onToolInvocation(); implemented by provider-specific gateways
Step — data: text, toolCalls[], toolResults[], finishReason, usage, meta
StructuredStep extends Step — adds: structured array<string,mixed>
AgentResponse — final response with messages, toolCalls, toolResults, steps, usage, meta
StructuredAgentResponse — extends AgentResponse, adds structured output
key_decisions: Is agent faked? → add fake-recording middleware
Agent uses RemembersConversations + has participant? → add RememberConversation middleware
Agent implements HasMiddleware? → merge agent middleware
Agent implements Conversational? → load prior messages
Agent implements HasStructuredOutput? → include JSON schema for structured response
Schema present? → return StructuredAgentResponse vs AgentResponse
Agent has currentConversation? → create new or reuse conversation
data_flow: AgentPrompt flows into pipeline as the passable object
Middleware may transform AgentPrompt (prepend/append/revise prompt text)
Terminal callback extracts messages, tools, schema from agent
Gateway returns GatewayResponse → split into typed AgentResponse/StructuredAgentResponse
Steps[] (Step | StructuredStep) carry per-inference-step detail including tool calls/results
Post-pipeline middleware enriches response with conversation metadata
key_relationships: GeneratesText uses AiManager::textProviderFor() for fake gateway injection
TextProvider implemented by concrete providers (OpenAiProvider, AnthropicProvider, etc.) via GeneratesText trait
AiManager extends MultipleInstanceManager, creates provider instances (createOpenaiDriver, createAnthropicDriver, etc.)
important_notes: The pipeline() helper is a thin factory (functions.php:35) returning Illuminate\Pipeline. The real orchestration logic lives in GeneratesText::prompt(). Middleware runs BEFORE the terminal callback; RememberConversation stores conversation AFTER (using .then() on the response). Tool invocation events (InvokingTool/ToolInvoked) are fired from within the gateway via registered callbacks. Steps accumulate per LLM call iteration in the tool-call loop inside the gateway layer.
